title: croton calycinus
intro: Croton calycinus, also known as the calico cotoneaster, is a shrub-like plant belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family, native to tropical Asia. The plant is used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Croton calycinus include the treatment of fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic to prevent infections. The plant can be prepared as herbal tea, ointments, or poultices for its medicinal uses, with some studies suggesting it has potential in treating certain diseases.
